w:r.w:t: Research work: Review paper on Composite material
End-to-End Autonomous Vehicle Control & Planning System (Q
Designing and deploying a real-time model-based control architecture (MPC) for autonomous vehicle lateral and longitudinal dynamics on physical hardware
Optimizing control performance for smoothness, stability, and safety, prioritizing deterministic behavior over end-to-end learning
Real-Time Neural Approximation of Constrained MPC via Imitation Learning
Designed and implemented a constrained Model Predictive Controller (MPC) for an unstable dynamic system (Linear Inverted Pendulum Model)
Trained a deep neural network policy using behavior cloning to approximate the MPC feedback law
Deployed the learned controller in closed-loop simulation and evaluated stability, tracking error, and disturbance rejection
Analyzed robustness and distribution shift effects in closed-loop learned control
Model Predictive Control for Disturbance-Aware Lap Time Optimization in Autonomous Racing Vehicles using two-step sequential programming
Formulate the lap-time optimization problem under disturbances and model uncertainty.
MPC that ensures the actual trajectory stays within a safety region around the nominal optimal racing line.
Optimal Trajectory following using AL-ILQR algorithms while avoiding dynamic obstacles using chance constraints
algorithm enabling optimal trajectory tracking while safely avoiding dynamic obstacles using chance
Modeled a linear quadrotor system, discretized the dynamics using RK4, and applied an LTV approximation to ensure real
time feasibility during constrained trajectory tracking.
Demonstrated reliable obstacle avoidance performance in simulation; identified and analyzed causes of significant deviation from the reference trajectory to guide future controller refinement
Detecting and Counting the number of objects on Production Line using PLC
Developed PLC program and implemented on real hardware (Allen-Bradl
Detecting the number of objects in the container and automatically replacing it with empty using PLC controller
Setting Alarming system to notify the task completion or any fault occurring during process
(Sorting Fruits and Vegetable using image classification
Developed a robotic sorting system for fruits and vegetables using ROS and Gazebo.
Designed and simulated the conveyor belt mechanism.
Optimized sorting accuracy and reduced manual intervention using AWS
Silicon Soft and IT Consultant Pvt. Ltd.
Gain confidence in learning and doing the task assigned in time
Improvised the Journey for Mobile Applications development for the first time in this company. Used Kotlin, Jetpack Compose and .Net framework.
Worked on a Cross-platform Mobile application with other team members. Used SQL, Kotlin, KMM, KTOR
Government Web application using REACT and JS
Implemented Kaizen to find out the root problem in production line and presented a detailed solution
Performed extended data acquisition and trend analysis to identify system
level energy losses and recommend efficiency improvements
GORKHA BREWERY PVT. LTD. (PART OF CARLSBERG GROUP)
Modification of the pull of cap
to install empty warning alarm sensor to save beer
Used the Kaizen tool to find out the root cause of the frequent stoppage of the filler machine and modified the design. This idea increased production by 0.12 million additional
Multi-agent system, System Modeling and Analysis,
